figura.error.importing.no_avatar_json: Folder does not have an "avatar.json" file.
figura.error.importing.invalid_json: Failed to parse json - "%s" must be a valid json object.
figura.error.importing.skinning_part_cap: Invalid parts array for Figura mesh skinning on model part "%s" in %s.bbmodel: expected at most 4 model parts! Likely a bug in the Figura Blockbench plugin to allow this.
figura.error.importing.negative_skinning: Invalid parts array for Figura mesh skinning on model part "%s" in %s.bbmodel: negative skinning offset! Likely a bug in the Figura Blockbench plugin to allow this.
figura.error.importing.no_vanilla_root: Model part "%s" in file "%s" has no vanilla root! Try using the Figura Blockbench Plugin to add one.
figura.error.importing.unknown_item_disp: Custom item model "%s" uses an unrecognized display context: "%s". Recognized contexts are: %s
figura.error.importing.unknown_texture_d: Failed to read Blockbench texture "%s", because there was no base64 header. Likely a bug with Figura, or an incompatible Blockbench version.
figura.error.loading.invalid_png: Failed to process texture "%s". Are you sure this is a valid PNG file?
figura.error.loading.script.unknown_exte: Script "%s" has an unknown file extension. Recognized extensions are: %s
figura.error.runtime.vanilla_part_callba: Script error during vanilla callback inside vanilla part "%s".
figura.error.runtime.model_part.callback: Script error during model part callback.
figura.error.runtime.model_part.stack_ov: Stack overflow during model part rendering. Part tree is too deep!
figura.error.runtime.model_part.unexpect: Unexpected issue during model part rendering. Please report to the devs so we can add a better message!
figura.error.runtime.script.unexpected_e: Unexpected error suring script %s. Check your log to find the stacktrace, and please report this to the devs so we can add a better error message!
figura.error.internal.unexpected: Unexpected internal error in Figura. Check your log to find the error stacktrace, and please report this to the devs so we can add a better error message!
figura.error.internal.subfile_io_error: IO Error while trying to read subfiles of file "%s". Likely bug in Figura, please notify devs!
figura.error.internal.missing_file: Figura was unable to find builtin file "%s"? Likely bug in Figura, please notify devs!
figura.error.internal.script.lua.compile: Figura builtin Lua file "%s" failed to compile! Likely bug in Figura, please notify devs!
figura.error.internal.script.lua.runtime: Figura builtin Lua file "%s" failed to run! Likely bug in Figura, please notify devs!
figura.error.internal.script.lua.setup_f: Figura failed to set up the Lua runtime. Likely bug in Figura, please notify devs!
